mainEntity.name: How much does a Jaguar AJ133 engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned AJ133 typically costs £5,500–£9,000 supply only [JAG‑QUOTE], varying by specification and whether it's naturally aspirated or supercharged. Fitting adds £910–£1,170 depending on labour rates.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar AJ133 a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: The AJ133 scores 3.5/5 for reliability [JAG‑VERIFIED], with 90% confidence based on 330 UK enquiries and specialist reports. Post‑2013 units are much more robust.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common AJ133 failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most common AJ133 failure is timing chain tensioner wear on pre‑2013 engines, typically appearing between 60,000–120,000 miles.

mainEntity.name: Which Jaguar models use the AJ133?

acceptedAnswer.text: The AJ133 powers the Jaguar XF, XJ, F‑Type, XK and XFR — a range of executive saloons, grand tourers and sports cars.

mainEntity.name: Is the Jaguar AJ133 the same as Land Rover's version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — it's the same 5.0‑litre V8 engine, used across both brands with identical parts and shared failure patterns.

hero.h1: Jaguar AJ133 Engine — Specs, Reliability & Replacement Cost
hero.subHeadline: The Jaguar AJ133 is a 5.0-litre V8 petrol — a superb engine let down by early timing‑chain issues. Backed by 330+ real UK enquiries in 2025 [JAG‑VERIFIED].

verdictRating.confidence: 90% — based on 330 UK enquiries and cross‑referenced specialist rebuild reports.

rows.score: 12 (A mix of cheap fixes (coolant pipes, supercharger coupler) and expensive ones (timing chain))
20 (Well‑supported; parts available from multiple UK suppliers)
4 (Reconditioned cost against lowest host value (~£8,000) exceeds 75% threshold)

verdictRating.oneLineVerdict: The AJ133 is a superb V8 when maintained — but early timing‑chain tensioners fail without warning before 100k — buy 2013+ or with tensioner history.
verdictRating.bestFor: Enthusiasts who value V8 character and can afford preventative maintenance.
verdictRating.avoidIf: Budget buyers looking at pre‑2013 cars with no chain history.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers the Land Rover Range Rover, Sport and Discovery → [link].

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting an AJ133 typically takes 14–18 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [JAG‑QUOTE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across Jaguar and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access.
